title: dianthus × courtoisii
intro: Dianthus × courtoisii, also known as the 'Carnival' or 'Court's Carnation', is a hybrid of the Dianthus genus, characterized by its vibrant and long-lasting flowers in shades of pink, red, and white. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Dianthus × courtoisii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, Dianthus × courtoisii has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
